data.title: Flow Metals Raises $400,000 and Moves to Settle Insider Debt via Shares
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Flow Metals Corp ( (TSE:FWM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Flow Metals Corp. has closed a fully subscribed private placement, raising $400,000 through the issuance of 8 million units at $0.05 per unit, each unit comprising one common share and half a warrant exercisable at $0.10 over 24 months. The company intends to use the net proceeds to fund exploration and development of its Yukon and British Columbia projects as well as for working capital, while also settling $78,000 of insider debt through the planned issuance of 1.2 million shares, a move that strengthens its balance sheet and provides additional runway for advancing its key gold projects, subject to regulatory approvals under Canadian securities rules governing related-party transactions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FWM) stock is a Hold with a C$0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Flow Metals Corp stock, see the TSE:FWM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FWM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FWM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial fundamentals (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, negative cash flow, and higher 2025 leverage). Technicals also indicate soft momentum. Offsetting these, recent corporate events are constructive for an early-stage explorer (permit, encouraging exploration signals, and financing to advance drilling), but they do not fully mitigate the current financial risk profile.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FWM stock, click here.

More about Flow Metals Corp

Flow Metals Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on advancing two 100%-owned, road-accessible projects in established mining districts in Yukon and British Columbia. Its flagship asset is the Sixtymile hard-rock gold project in Yukon, located in the historic Sixtymile placer camp, positioning the company within a well-known gold-producing region.

Average Trading Volume: 19,385

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1M

For an in-depth examination of FWM stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

The latest announcement is out from James Bay Resources ( (TSE:JBR) ).

James Bay Resources Limited has closed the second tranche of its previously announced non-brokered private placement of common shares, raising gross proceeds of $157,000 through the issuance of 7,875,000 shares at $0.02 per share, following a first tranche that raised $75,000 via 3,750,000 shares on the same terms. The latest shares are subject to a standard four-month-plus-one-day hold period, and the completion of this financing modestly strengthens the company’s balance sheet and share float on the Canadian Securities Exchange, providing additional capital for its ongoing corporate activities while underscoring its reliance on small equity raises in the current market environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:JBR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on James Bay Resources stock, see the TSE:JBR Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:JBR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, negative equity, and continued negative cash flow). Technical indicators provide only modest near-term support, and valuation metrics offer little help because earnings are negative and no dividend is indicated.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:JBR stock, click here.

James Bay Resources Limited is a Canadian company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the symbol JBR, with 90,201,241 common shares issued and outstanding as of the date of the release. data.title: One Bullion Advances Botswana Gold Projects Amid Record Market Strength
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Imperial Ginseng Products ( (TSE:OBUL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

One Bullion has provided a gold market and portfolio update, highlighting that record-high gold prices and continued safe-haven demand create a supportive environment for advanced exploration projects. In Botswana’s Kraaipan Greenstone Belt, the company controls about 65 kilometres of strike near Harmony Gold’s long-producing Kalgold mine and has defined 26 high-sulphide priority targets through an Induced Polarization survey, with additional mapping and prospecting results pending. At the Vumba Greenstone Belt, initial exploration work, including soil sampling, trenching, reverse circulation and diamond drilling, has confirmed a large, structurally controlled, continuous gold system with meaningful potential for expansion, underscoring One Bullion’s leverage to a historically strong gold market and its efforts to move multiple projects toward the drilling and resource-definition stages.

More about Imperial Ginseng Products

One Bullion Ltd. is a Vancouver-based gold exploration company that fully owns three highly prospective mining areas in Botswana, focusing on large, district-scale land packages in Archean greenstone belts. The company’s portfolio includes extensive strike length in the Kraaipan Greenstone Belt and the Vumba Greenstone Belt, positioning it to benefit from strong global gold prices and sustained investor demand for gold as a hedge asset.

Average Trading Volume: 631,438

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$17.81M

For a thorough assessment of OBUL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zoomcar Launches Warrant Exchange Offer and Bridge Financing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zoomcar Holdings ( (ZCAR) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 23, 2026, Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. launched an offer to exchange several classes of its outstanding common stock purchase warrants and pre-funded warrants for shares of its common stock at set exchange ratios, including 20,000 common shares for each common warrant and 10 common shares for most other warrant types, in a move aimed at simplifying its capital structure and potentially reducing future warrant overhang. The exchange offer, which relies on an exemption from registration under the Securities Act, is contingent on shareholder approval to increase the company’s authorized common shares and related charter amendments, and is accompanied by a solicitation of consents to amend existing warrant terms and post-offer treatment, underscoring a broader effort to realign its equity and governance framework. Also on January 23, 2026, Zoomcar initiated a private bridge financing of up to $5 million, with a $2 million minimum by February 28, 2026, selling units comprising Series A convertible preferred stock and common stock warrants at $1,000 per unit, a financing step that provides near-term liquidity support and adds a new layer of senior, convertible capital while further expanding potential common equity through low conversion and exercise prices.

The most recent analyst rating on (ZCAR) stock is a Hold with a $0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zoomcar Holdings stock, see the ZCAR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ZCAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZCAR is a Underperform.

Zoomcar Holdings receives a low overall stock score due to significant financial instability, bearish technical indicators, and poor valuation metrics. The company’s high leverage, negative equity, and lack of profitability are major concerns. Technical analysis further indicates a strong downward trend, and the absence of earnings and dividends suggests overvaluation.

To see Spark’s full report on ZCAR stock, click here.

More about Zoomcar Holdings

Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. is an emerging growth company and smaller reporting company focused on the mobility sector, providing app-based car-sharing and related vehicle access services in emerging markets. The company targets a large serviceable addressable market and is currently engaged in restructuring efforts, including cost optimization, quality improvement and debt restructuring, as it seeks to strengthen its competitive position and maintain its public listing.

Average Trading Volume: 34,100

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $516.3K

Find detailed analytics on ZCAR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Interactive Strength Inc ( (TRNR) ) is now available.

On January 16, 2026, Interactive Strength Inc. reported that TR Opportunities II LLC, the current holder of its Incremental Senior Secured Convertible Promissory Note, converted approximately $1.57 million of the note’s principal into 2,110,901 shares of the company’s common stock. The conversion, executed under a securities law exemption for exchanges with existing security holders and involving no placement commissions, significantly increased the company’s equity base, bringing total common shares outstanding to 5,253,081 as of that date and further shifting a portion of its capital structure from debt to equity.

The most recent analyst rating on (TRNR) stock is a Buy with a $2.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Interactive Strength Inc stock, see the TRNR Stock Forecast page.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality—large ongoing losses, heavy cash burn, and rising debt that elevate financing risk. Technicals also remain poor with the stock far below key moving averages and negative momentum, while valuation is difficult to assess due to negative earnings and no dividend support; recent convertible financings add potential dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on TRNR stock, click here.

More about Interactive Strength Inc

Interactive Strength Inc. operates in the fitness and strength-training sector, offering technology-enabled exercise solutions underpinned by its common stock listed on public markets. The company finances its operations in part through structured debt and equity instruments, including convertible promissory notes that can be exchanged into shares of its common stock.

data.title: NIIT USA to Inject Up to USD 300,000 into Brazil Subsidiary for Growth and Working Capital
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd ( (IN:NIITMTS) ) just unveiled an update.

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd has disclosed that its subsidiary NIIT USA Inc has approved an additional equity infusion of up to USD 300,000 into its step-down subsidiary NIIT Brazil LTDA to fund growth initiatives and working capital needs. The move is aimed at reinforcing NIIT’s Latin American operations and supporting services for its corporate learning customers in the region, while the company emphasized that the investment will not materially affect its consolidated financials and that NIIT Brazil will remain a wholly owned subsidiary within the group structure.

More about NIIT Learning Systems Ltd

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary NIIT USA Inc, operates in the learning and training services industry, providing corporate learning solutions to clients globally. The group has been expanding its geographic footprint to support clients in multiple regions, including establishing NIIT Brazil LTDA as a platform to serve corporate learning group (CLG) customers and strengthen its presence in Latin America.

Average Trading Volume: 4,249

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 55.3B INR

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Premier Diversified Holdings ( (TSE:AJA) ).

Aja Health and Wellness Inc. has expanded distribution of its MyCare Ally healthcare support program by signing a broker agreement with Greatway Financial Inc., a Canada-wide Insurance Managing General Agency that will market and solicit enrollments for the service in every province except Quebec, with marketing for the GOeVisit-powered service expected to start in early February 2026. The company is also upgrading its GOeVisit virtual care platform to a new electronic medical records system later this month, a move designed to enable monitored programs such as GLP-1-based weight management, lab requisition capabilities and broader virtual testing services, signalling an effort to deepen its digital health offering and enhance its competitiveness in the virtual care market.

More about Premier Diversified Holdings

Aja Health and Wellness Inc., listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, operates in the digital and virtual healthcare sector through subsidiaries Assured Diagnosis Inc. and Aja Health Inc. Its offerings include the GOeVisit virtual health consultation platform and the MyCare Ally full-spectrum healthcare support service, which combines virtual physician care, diagnostic coordination and secure digital health information for individuals and families across Canada.

Jones Soda ( (JSDA) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 16, 2026, Jones Soda Co. agreed to sell a secured promissory note originally issued by MJ Reg Disrupters, LLC, assigning a remaining balance of $2 million on the note—previously due in installments through June 2028—to Two Shores Capital Corp. in exchange for a $1.4 million cash payment. As part of the transaction, Jones Soda also granted Two Shores Capital warrants to purchase 550,000 shares of its common stock at $0.40 per share, exercisable for three years, and stated that it plans to use the cash proceeds for general working capital, bolstering its liquidity and financial flexibility.

data.title: Jaguar Health Executes Debt-Reducing Equity Warrant Transactions
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Jaguar Animal Health ( (JAGX) ) is now available.

On January 16, 2026, Jaguar Health executed a series of privately negotiated exchanges with Iliad Research and Trading and Streeterville Capital that reduced outstanding royalty interests and retired portions of its Series L and Series M perpetual preferred stock in return for issuing multiple pre-funded common stock purchase warrants. The transactions cut $1.19 million from an October 2020 royalty interest and $850,000 from an August 2022 royalty interest, and cancelled specified Series L and Series M preferred shares held by the two investors, while creating new pre-funded warrants exercisable at a nominal price and subject to a 9.99% ownership cap, effectively deleveraging the balance sheet at the cost of potential future equity dilution for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JAGX) stock is a Hold with a $0.82 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jaguar Animal Health stock, see the JAGX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JAGX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JAGX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses, high leverage, and heavy cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (trading below all major moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events provide a meaningful positive offset via non-dilutive funding and encouraging clinical progress, but not enough to overcome current financial and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on JAGX stock, click here.

More about Jaguar Animal Health

Jaguar Health, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company that finances its operations in part through structured royalty interests and preferred stock issuances, indicating a capital-raising strategy focused on specialized securities and private transactions with institutional investors.
